title: Civillis Technology Compatibility
description: Adds compatibility between Civillis and various tech mods.
body: Requires Civilis as a dependency. Addon for [Civilis](https://modrinth.com/mod/civillis) to add compatibility to most tech mods. Most machines and utility blocks that are signs of a player will now create Civilis' civilized areas, preventing mob spawns in a nearby radius without the use of torches. Small blocks such as pipes or cables are not supported. Mods such as Create, Applied Energistics 2 and other storage mods are already supported by default in Civilis.   ## __**Adds support for the following mods:**__ * Create's Addons * Create Cobblestone * Create Connected * Create Radar * Create Metallurgy * Create Enchantment Industries * Create Additions * The Factory Must Grow * Create Railways * Industrial Foregoing * Mekanism * Additional Enchanted Miners (Quarry+) * RFTools * Strange Matter * Thermal Series * Tinkers' Construct ## __**Other Addons**__ [Civilis Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/civilis-magic-compatibility) adds support for most magic mods. [Civilis Minecolonies](https://modrinth.com/mod/civilis-minecolonies-compatibility) adds support for Minecolonies buildings to better protect colonies. ## __**Mod Development**__ Civilis and Civilis Technology are still in development. More mods will be supported in the future. Contributions are welcome via the mod's GitHub repository. Civilis Technology is an addon made in collaboration with the original Civilis developer. [ReversTeam Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/TJKZgr6UDg) [Civilis Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jzRcfjfK2w)   Feel free to be used in any modpack.
